title: More Lucky Charm Addon
description: This mod adds more lucky charms to the Nastia Miracle Stone mod.
body:
# Description  
**The More Lucky Charm Addon is added to the Nastia Miracle Stone mod to obtain more lucky charms with the Ladybug Miraculous.**

## Features  
- Many lucky charms from the series have been added or perhaps Lucky Charm Fan items.

## Installation  
**Forge:**  
- Requires [Forge 1.20.1](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.20.1.html)  
- Requires [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
- Requires [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
- Requires [Kleiders Custom Renderer API](https://modrinth.com/mod/kleiders-custom-renderer-api) for Forge
  
### And of course..
-  Requires [Nastia Miracle Stone](https://modrinth.com/mod/nastia%60s-miracle-stones)
